currentPredicate: Predicates 9/10 remain unproved after v43/v44 governed live probes and independent read-only review; predicates 1-8 remain proved; predicates 11/12 remain blocked.
blockedReason: Three materially distinct strategies were tried in this continuation (architectural acceptance/source-diversity gates, false-unresolved decision-constraint repair, and substitute governed holdout). Fresh generated outputs still fail product acceptance: remote-clinic failed closed, v44 substitute failed closed, and independent reviewer rejected v43 generated reports for unresolved decision constraints and templated experiment thresholds.
assignment: Architectural repair before further paid reruns: independent pass/fail review artifact, generic source diversity/admission, evidence-derived experiments, real contradiction/dissent and transfer boundaries, fail-closed decision-constraint resolution.
